reasoning: The control 6.2.2 focuses on ensuring that systems are kept up-to-date with supported versions and compliant patching. In a Kubernetes context, this can be mapped to ensuring that the Kubernetes cluster is running a supported version and that the underlying node operating systems are patched and compliant. The function 'k8s_cluster_uses_supported_version' ensures that the Kubernetes version is supported, similar to the cloud checks for cluster versions. 'k8s_node_os_patching_compliant' addresses the need for compliant patching of the node operating systems, akin to managed patching services in cloud environments.
title: Requirement 6.2.2
